items.title: Vast Fantasy Worlds Game Dev Bundle

A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!

items.title: The Best of Robert Silverberg by Open Road Media
items.long_description: Feel like you’ve read all the new sci-fi and fantasy books and looking for something a little more classic? We’ve got a bundle full of the best novels and stories by celebrated author Robert Silverberg! Dive into his Majipoor Cycle with Lord Valentine’s Castle, following an amnesiac juggler who finds out he’s the heir to an entire planet, or start with the prequel trilogy launched by Sorcerers of Majipoor, and learn how the throne became so contested in the first place. Meet the new inheritors of the Earth in At Winter’s End, a tribe of humanoids who emerge from their hibernation after an apocalypse. Or keep things short and sweet with the novella Nightwings, set on an unfamiliar Earth facing alien invasion. There are many more worlds, futures, and adventures to explore in this ebook bundle of Silverberg’s work, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support the ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

items.title: Humble 15th Anniversary - Indie Icons Showcase
items.description: An anniversary present from us to you!
items.long_description:
Happy Anniversary to us! We’re celebrating 15 years of Humble Bundle with another extra-special bundle of our favorite indie games! Guide a cursed orphan through a demon-infested castle before your body turns to crystal in Castlevania’s spiritual successor Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night! Play an upgraded spin on an old favorite in iconic roguelike Risk of Rain Returns, where the passenger of a crashed freighter must survive on an alien planet of monsters! Climb a haunted mountain and defeat nightmares, panic, and self-doubt in Celeste! There are even more great games in this bundle we’re sure you’ll love just as much as we do, so grab them now, and support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027.

items.title: All-In-One 2D Game Dev Level Creation Pack
items.long_description:
Build entire game worlds faster with this massive Level Creation Bundle from GameDev Market. Designed to streamline your workflow, this collection gives you everything you need to create levels across multiple styles - from top-down and platformer to isometric environments and beyond. Jump straight into development with ready-to-use tilesets like Wolfsong Tilesets, Pixel Art Tileset Collection, Cartoon Platformer Tileset Pack, and more, all built to help you quickly design, iterate, and expand your worlds without starting from scratch. Stop piecing levels together asset-by-asset—get a complete toolkit to bring your ideas to life, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027. The coupon expires on August 31st, 2026.

The license agreement can be found here.

items.title: Build, Shuffle, Battle!
items.long_description:
Build, shuffle, and battle throughout an all-star collection of inventive deckbuilders! Get tactical in Wildfrost, a roguelike deckbuilder where you’ll fight to collect cards strong enough to defrost an eternal winter! Turn up the fun dial in The Spirit Lift, a retro analog-style deckbuilder set in a haunted 1990s hotel. Or uncover the mysteries of BOOK OF HOURS, a narrative RPG with deckbuilding elements set in a fictional 1930s world filled with hidden gods. Shuffle new games into your personal collection for a price you choose, and help support the TD Foundation with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027

items.title: Dungeon Masters Role-Playing Essentials- 3D Printable Miniatures & Scenery
items.long_description: Take your passion for Dungeons & Dragons to the next level, and start creating your own campaign assets from home! Customize your own miniature figures and gorgeous scenery with an epic collection of 3D printing-ready templates from Hayland Terrains and Warp Miniatures! Campaigns become more personal when you put your creativity and imagination into them, so don’t wait, print and color your own Barbarian Riders, multi-part pirates, behemoth Wyverns, and more. Pay what you want for 3D-printable templates and help support the magic at Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

items.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
items.long_description: Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

items.title: Adventurer's Audio Loot
items.description: It’s adventure time with amazing audio
items.long_description: Dynamic sound design adds the next level of polish you’ve been searching for—unlock ultra realistic sound effects to your next project’s epic battles with the Adventurer's Audio Loot Bundle! Make your players feel every punch and kick land with the Combat - High Intensity Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Capture the echoes and creepy crawlers of the dark with the Dungeon Exploration Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Or satisfy that itch to hear the perfect menu navigation sounds with the Menu/UI Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Pay what you want for a curated collection of A+ audio assets and help support the ESA Foundation with your purchase.

items.title: Ultimate Unreal and Unity Assets Galore and More
items.long_description:
Make your life easier with modular fantasy assets from the experts at Hivemind. Build mammoth fortifications and raise your banners when you combine asset packs like Castle Forge: Modular Medieval Castle and Dungeon Builder: Modular Top Down RPG Environment Kit. Add spooky mystery and intrigue to the setting of your next big project with the Modular Haunted House Building Kit. Unlock the ultimate Unreal Engine and Unity asset bundle and help support Make-A-Wish with your purchase.

Keys Expire. Please redeem before May 19th, 2027. Professional Fab Marketplace keys and Unity Asset Store keys provided.

items.title: Mercedes Lackey: Valdemar and Beyond by DAW Books
items.description: Explore the worlds of a fantasy legend
items.long_description: If you’re a fantasy fan, you’ve probably heard of Mercedes Lackey, one of the most prolific and influential voices in the sci-fi/fantasy arena. If you’ve always meant to pick up one of her books but never got around to it, or if you’ve read a little of her work and are dying for more, we’ve got an ebook bundle full to the brim of Lackey’s biggest and best, from her bestselling Valdemar saga and beyond! Dive into the Kingdom of Valdemar with the first entry in the series, the magical adventure Arrows of the Queen. Reawaken the lost magic of the land in Winds of Fate. Solve the mystery of a young mage-in-training’s secret past in the dark academia adventure Intrigues. There are 37 books in total to explore in this bundle, so get it now for the price of your choice, and ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

items.title: Spring Into Creativity
items.long_description: Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.

items.title: The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle
items.long_description:
Looking for a little help crafting the rich worlds of your next game project? Then The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle is the 1,000+ asset library you need! This cosmos-sized collection contains everything you need, from the steampunk assets within the Victorian Environment Megapack to fantasy alien castles and magical elven cities. Unleash your creative potential and bring your imagination to life like never before with a 1-month trial subscription to Cosmos, Leartes’ expansive selection of high-quality 3D assets! Pay what you want for the ultimate asset bundle and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 20th, 2027.
